'''鈭歱-v-v-h''' ('''kapavehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moor|moor]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moor|moor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-v-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kapavehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipavehoko|thipavehoko]] || [[word:jipavehoko|jipavehoko]] || [[word:shipavehoko|shipavehoko]] || [[word:kipavehoko|kipavehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupavehoko|thuthupavehoko]] || [[word:jujupavehoko|jujupavehoko]] || [[word:shushupavehoko|shushupavehoko]] || [[word:kukupavehoko|kukupavehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupavehoko|thupavehoko]] || [[word:jupavehoko|jupavehoko]] || [[word:shupavehoko|shupavehoko]] || [[word:kupavehoko|kupavehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupavehoko|thupavehoko]] || [[word:jupavehoko|jupavehoko]] || [[word:shupavehoko|shupavehoko]] || [[word:kupavehoko|kupavehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepavehoko|thepavehoko]] || [[word:jepavehoko|jepavehoko]] || [[word:shepavehoko|shepavehoko]] || [[word:kepavehoko|kepavehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopavehoko|thothopavehoko]] || [[word:jojopavehoko|jojopavehoko]] || [[word:shoshopavehoko|shoshopavehoko]] || [[word:kokopavehoko|kokopavehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopavehoko|thopavehoko]] || [[word:jopavehoko|jopavehoko]] || [[word:shopavehoko|shopavehoko]] || [[word:kopavehoko|kopavehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopavehoko|thopavehoko]] || [[word:jopavehoko|jopavehoko]] || [[word:shopavehoko|shopavehoko]] || [[word:kopavehoko|kopavehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pavehoko|th忙pavehoko]] || [[word:j忙pavehoko|j忙pavehoko]] || [[word:sh忙pavehoko|sh忙pavehoko]] || [[word:k忙pavehoko|k忙pavehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapavehoko|thathapavehoko]] || [[word:jajapavehoko|jajapavehoko]] || [[word:shashapavehoko|shashapavehoko]] || [[word:kakapavehoko|kakapavehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapavehoko|thapavehoko]] || [[word:japavehoko|japavehoko]] || [[word:shapavehoko|shapavehoko]] || [[word:kapavehoko|kapavehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapavehoko|thapavehoko]] || [[word:japavehoko|japavehoko]] || [[word:shapavehoko|shapavehoko]] || [[word:kapavehoko|kapavehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapavehithi|shapavehithi]] || [[word:shapavehiji|shapavehiji]] || [[word:shapavehishi|shapavehishi]] || [[word:shapavehiki|shapavehiki]]
